text.title: Indie Postmortem Template Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Indie Postmortem Template. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Postmortem is blameless even when solo; factor language is 'system / decision / context', not 'I screwed up'.
rule.rationale: Postmortem is blameless even when solo; factor language is 'system / decision / context', not 'I screwed up'.

rule.statement: Reconstruct the timeline before analysing factors.
rule.rationale: Reconstruct the timeline before analysing factors.

rule.statement: Cap follow-up actions at 3; more = none get done.
rule.rationale: Cap follow-up actions at 3; more = none get done.

rule.statement: Hard timebox to 30 min; cap is feature, not bug.
rule.rationale: Hard timebox to 30 min; cap is feature, not bug.

rule.statement: Postmortem doc lives at a known URL; otherwise the lesson dissipates.
rule.rationale: Postmortem doc lives at a known URL; otherwise the lesson dissipates.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-indie-postmortem-template.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
